mapper.select: SELECT company_id AS companyId, #{statDate} AS statDate, -- 利用 SUM(CASE WHEN...) 实现一次扫描，多列计数！极速！ SUM(CASE WHEN scan_type = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fillCount, SUM(CASE WHEN scan_type = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inspectionCount, SUM(CASE WHEN scan_type = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inCount, SUM(CASE WHEN scan_type = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outCount FROM scan_record WHERE scan_time >= #{startTime} AND scan_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY company_id
